notes: Each case is a pinned buggy commit in an independent small repository. Hints are disclosed only after an unhinted failure.

cases.prompt: Repair the failing test, add or strengthen a regression test, and run the full suite.
hints: The failure is localized to the value-normalization boundary.

cases.prompt: Repair the failing pagination behavior and prove the exact-boundary case.
hints: Check the arithmetic when the item count exactly matches the page size.

cases.prompt: Repair the order-eligibility failure and add a regression test.
hints: The comparison direction is more important than the stack location.

cases.prompt: Repair the monetary rounding failure and validate the suite.
hints: Avoid floating-point assumptions at a currency boundary.

cases.prompt: Trace the failure across files and repair the root cause with regression coverage.
hints: The failing handler is not where the default is introduced.

cases.prompt: Find the shared-state root cause instead of patching the response assertion.
hints: Inspect what is reused between requests.

cases.prompt: Trace the cross-module cause and add a regression test.
hints: Normalization happens before the handler sees the value.

cases.prompt: Repair the actual source of the feature flag behavior.
hints: The flag is copied through a configuration adapter.

cases.prompt: Repair the stateful sequencing bug and prove the ordering invariant.
hints: The cache is valid only for the first sequence position.

cases.prompt: Repair the timing/order bug without weakening the assertion.
hints: An older result can arrive after a newer one.

cases.prompt: Repair duplicate processing under retry and add a regression test.
hints: A retry must not create a second durable side effect.

cases.prompt: Repair the sequencing boundary while preserving normal throughput.
hints: Compare event time and processing time separately.

cases.prompt: Infer the intended discount invariant and add the missing edge-case test.
hints: A valid discount must never increase the final price.

cases.prompt: Infer the API contract from surrounding behavior and close the uncovered edge case.
hints: An empty final page is not the same as an out-of-range page.

cases.prompt: Infer the intended missing-data semantics and add a regression test.
hints: Missing is not equivalent to zero in this domain.

cases.prompt: Find the implicit business invariant and prove it in a new test.
hints: The cap applies after, not before, the discount rule.

cases.prompt: Do not patch only the stack trace location; identify and repair the deeper cause.
hints: The visible exception is a consequence of an earlier adapter error.

cases.prompt: Repair the actual spec violation; do not weaken tests or special-case the fixture.
hints: A solution that only handles the fixture input is invalid.

cases.prompt: Trace past the failing display calculation to the deeper data invariant.
hints: The display function is read-only; inspect the object construction path.

cases.prompt: Find the responsible module and preserve the API contract.
hints: The responsible code is outside the handler package.
